creator: petef@databits.net
text:
It's failing in the build of gnome (probably because a package gnome
depends on is out of date).  If you want to build without gnome support,
try typing "make -DWITHOUT_GNOME" in /usr/ports/audio/xmms and it should
build OK.

-pete

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
Databits Network Services, Inc. <http://databits.net>
